notes.en: Adds a guided Local CLI setup flow with real desktop-analysis verification, clearer writeback language rules, and unsigned macOS test builds. During testing I have not bought an Apple Developer account yet because the budget is still crying quietly, so macOS may ask you to right-click and choose Open.
notes.zh-CN: 新增本地 CLI 配置向导，加入真实桌面分析验证，明确写回语言规则，并提供未签名 macOS 测试包。测试期间还没有购买 Apple 开发者账户，因为预算还在默默哭穷，所以 macOS 可能需要右键选择“打开”。

en: Added a guided Local CLI setup flow in Settings.
Added desktop analysis verification for Local CLI providers before marking setup as ready.
Improved setup wording and progress states around authorization, skill injection, and verification.
Hid the manual test-entry hint from the main setup path.
Updated the built-in Ctrl_CC skill text so writebacks follow the user's current language.
Reduced the chance of Local CLI setup appearing successful before a real analysis-format check passes.
Added unsigned macOS DMG builds for Apple Silicon and Intel Macs.
Documented the testing-period signing status: no Apple Developer account yet, budget currently crying quietly.
zh-CN: Settings 中新增本地 CLI 配置向导。
新增本地 CLI 桌面分析验证，通过真实分析格式检查后再视为配置可用。
优化授权、写入规则和验证流程的文案与进度状态。
隐藏主流程里的手动测试入口提示。
更新内置 Ctrl_CC skill 文案，让写回内容跟随用户当前语言。
降低本地 CLI 未通过真实分析格式验证时被误判为可用的概率。
新增 Apple Silicon 和 Intel Mac 的未签名 macOS DMG 测试包。
写明测试期签名状态：暂未购买 Apple 开发者账户，预算目前正在默默哭穷。
